name: PaginationRoot
description: Pagination navigation for paged content. Renders a <nav> with aria-label.
whenToUse: For lists or tables that split content across multiple pages.
avoidWhen: For infinite scroll - use intersection observer instead.
accessibilityRequirements: aria-label='Pagination' on nav. aria-current='page' on active page.

siblingCount.description: Number of page buttons on each side of active

parts.name: PaginationFirst
parts.description: First page button. Disabled when on page 1.
parts.whenToUse: For quick navigation to the first page of results.

parts.name: PaginationPrevious
parts.description: Previous page button. Disabled when on page 1.

parts.name: PaginationNext
parts.description: Next page button. Disabled when on last page.

parts.name: PaginationLast
parts.description: Last page button. Disabled when on last page.
parts.whenToUse: For quick navigation to the last page of results.

parts.name: PaginationItems
parts.description: Renders the computed page number buttons with ellipsis.

parts.name: PaginationEllipsis
parts.description: Standalone ellipsis indicator for skipped pages.

examples.title: Basic Pagination
examples.code:
{ const el = e.currentTarget as any; page = (el.page ?? page); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; page = (el.page ?? page); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; page = (el.page ?? page); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; page = (el.page ?? page); }} total={100} perPage={10} aria-label="Pagination">

Current page: {page}
